hooks.prompt:
File written: {{tool.input.file_path}}
Stop if not a .py file.
Read py-lint-driven.local.md (defaults: hooks_enabled=true, tdd_enabled=true, hooks_run_complexity=false, iteration_limit=5, xenon_max_absolute=B, xenon_max_modules=A, xenon_max_average=A). Stop if hooks_enabled=false.

If TEST FILE (path contains /tests/ or starts with tests/):
1. Run: task python:test:file FILE={{tool.input.file_path}}
   - If FAIL: red state confirmed (expected for new tests)
   - If PASS: warn 'Tests pass before implementation — verify they test correct behavior'
2. Run: task python:ruff FILES={{tool.input.file_path}} — fix any violations.

If SOURCE FILE: invoke the lint-iterator agent passing: file={{tool.input.file_path}}, tdd_enabled=<value>, hooks_run_complexity=<value>, xenon_max_absolute=<value>, xenon_max_modules=<value>, xenon_max_average=<value>, iteration_limit=<value>.

File edited: {{tool.input.file_path}}
Stop if not a .py file.
Read py-lint-driven.local.md (defaults: hooks_enabled=true, tdd_enabled=true, hooks_run_complexity=false, iteration_limit=5, xenon_max_absolute=B, xenon_max_modules=A, xenon_max_average=A). Stop if hooks_enabled=false.

If TEST FILE (path contains /tests/ or starts with tests/):
1. Run: task python:test:file FILE={{tool.input.file_path}}
2. Run: task python:ruff FILES={{tool.input.file_path}} — fix any violations.

If SOURCE FILE: invoke the lint-iterator agent passing: file={{tool.input.file_path}}, tdd_enabled=<value>, hooks_run_complexity=<value>, xenon_max_absolute=<value>, xenon_max_modules=<value>, xenon_max_average=<value>, iteration_limit=<value>.
